hero.headline: Your Go-To Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
hero.subheadline: Expert diagnostics, repairs, and maintenance — backed by decades of experience and a commitment to quality.

featureSections.title: State-of-the-Art Diagnostic Equipment
featureSections.body: We use the latest diagnostic tools to pinpoint issues quickly and accurately, saving you time and money.
featureSections.cardBody: We explain every issue in plain language and provide a detailed estimate before any work begins.

featureSections.title: Keep Your Car Running Smoothly
featureSections.body: Regular maintenance is the key to extending your vehicle's life. We offer tailored service intervals for every make and model.
featureSections.cardBody: We work around your busy schedule with early morning drop-offs and prompt service.

whyChooseUs.title: Experienced Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our ASE-certified mechanics have decades of combined experience with all major vehicle brands.

whyChooseUs.title: Honest Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We provide upfront, competitive pricing with no hidden fees — ever.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Parts & Service
whyChooseUs.description: We use only OEM or high-quality aftermarket parts and back our work with a solid warranty.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer-First Approach
whyChooseUs.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We communicate clearly and ensure you're informed every step of the way.

testimonials.quote: GTO Automotive has been taking care of my family's cars for years. They're honest, fair, and do great work.
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: I brought my car in for a check engine light and they diagnosed it quickly. The repair was done on time and on budget.
testimonials.author: Jessica L.

testimonials.quote: Finally found a mechanic I can trust. They explained everything and didn't try to upsell me. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Tom S.

cta.headline: Ready to Experience Top-Tier Auto Service?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online to get your car back on the road safely.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to complex repairs, GTO Automotive offers a full range of auto services to keep your vehicle running at its best. Our experienced technicians use advanced equipment and quality parts to ensure your safety and satisfaction.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert repairs for all engine issues.
services.longDescription: Our technicians use cutting-edge diagnostic equipment to identify engine problems quickly. Whether it's a check engine light, loss of power, or strange noises, we'll get to the root cause and perform reliable repairs.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system and run a full scan.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: Our technician interprets the data and identifies the issue.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We perform the necessary repairs using quality parts and test-drive to confirm.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within an hour. Complex issues may require more time.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on engine repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our engine repairs come with a parts and labor warranty for your peace of mind.

services.title: Brake Services
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspection, repair, and replacement.
services.longDescription: Your safety depends on reliable brakes. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid to ensure your braking system is in top condition. We offer both standard and performance options.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check brake pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We explain what needs to be replaced and provide options.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install new components and test the system for optimal performance.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brakes?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We'll inspect them for free.

faqs.question: Do you use OEM or aftermarket parts?
faqs.answer: We offer both OEM and high-quality aftermarket options to fit your budget.

services.title: Oil Changes & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular oil changes.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the simplest way to extend engine life. We use premium oils and filters, and also check other fluids like coolant, transmission, and brake fluid.

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: We drain old oil and replace with the correct grade and filter.

process.title: Fluid Check
process.description: We top off all other fluids as needed.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We perform a visual check of belts, hoses, and undercarriage.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality conventional or synthetic oil based on your vehicle's requirements.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most vehicles need an oil change every 5,000-7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual.

services.title: Transmission Services
services.longDescription: Transmission problems can be complex. Our technicians are trained to diagnose and repair both automatic and manual transmissions. We offer fluid changes, rebuilds, and replacements.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We scan for codes and test drive to assess transmission behavior.

process.title: Service Plan
process.description: We recommend the best course of action, from fluid change to rebuild.

process.title: Completion
process.description: We perform the service and test drive to ensure smooth operation.

faqs.question: What are signs of transmission trouble?
faqs.answer: Slipping gears, delayed engagement, strange noises, or fluid leaks are common signs.

faqs.question: Do you rebuild transmissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have the expertise to rebuild most transmissions in-house.

about.headline: Dallas' Trusted Auto Care Since 1985
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe on the road.
story: GTO Automotive was founded in 1985 with a simple mission: provide reliable auto repair with integrity. Over the decades, we've grown from a small shop to a trusted name in Dallas, serving generations of families. Our team brings together decades of combined experience, and we invest in the latest diagnostic technology to serve you better.

We believe in transparency and education. Every customer receives a clear explanation of their vehicle's needs, along with a fair estimate. Whether it's a minor tune-up or a major engine repair, we treat every car as if it were our own. That commitment has earned us a loyal customer base and a reputation for excellence.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs — and what it doesn't.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and stand behind our work with a warranty.

coreValues.title: Expertise
coreValues.description: Our technicians are ASE-certified and continuously trained.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be a local business that gives back to Dallas.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? Call or stop by today.
